results.rendered_html:
4. e (ā-√i) P. -eti, to come near or towards, go near, approach,  RV. ;  AV. ;  ŚBr.  &c.;
(with and without punar) to come back, come again to,  AitBr. ;  MBh. ;  Kathās.  &c.;
to reach, attain, enter, come into (a state or position),  Mn. xii, 125 ;  Megh. ;  Prab.  &c.;
to submit, fall to one's share,  ChUp. v, 14, 1  (āyayanti ?),  KaṭhUp.  :
Intens. Ā. (3. du. -iyāte; 1. pl. -īmahe)
to hasten near,  RV. vii, 39, 2 ;
to request,  VS. iv, 5.
